guide_step: Run your first mission › Step 1: Create a product shell
note: Image shows the Composer Target project + Deploy fieldset with the repo (Git remote), live_url (Live URL), and version_endpoint (Version endpoint) fields named by the step. Demo values only (name demo-mission, repo github.com/acme/demo-app, live_url demo.example.com, version_endpoint /version); no real emails, tokens, or secrets. No error state.

guide_step: Run your first mission › Step 3: Describe your goal
note: The captured Goal region is a real, clean capture of the live composer (GOAL section with the mission/Goal field plus the acceptance-criteria list and + Add criterion / Skip controls) and contains no PII (demo mission text only). content_match is fail against the step wording: the step names a separate "Constraints field" that does not exist on the live composer — constraints are expressed through the acceptance-criteria list. Re-capture cannot resolve this (the named control no longer exists); follow-up guide-text revision needed to rename "Constraints field" to the acceptance-criteria list. Image is a real capture, not fabricated; retained for reference. Matches inventory status NEEDS-REVIEW for this slot.

guide_step: Run your first mission › Step 4: Accept the draft queue
note: The captured Mission queue panel is a real, clean capture of the live composer (server-rendered queue list with the Enqueue button and Priority order label, plus the AI assist / Draft form and mission.yaml preview) and contains no PII (demo queue items and demo config only). content_match is fail against the step wording: the step names an "Accept draft" button that does not exist on the live composer — drafts are produced via AI assist and committed with Inject into mission / Enqueue. Re-capture cannot resolve this (the named control no longer exists); follow-up guide-text revision needed to rename "Accept draft" to Enqueue / Inject into mission. Image is a real capture, not fabricated; retained for reference. Matches inventory status NEEDS-REVIEW for this slot.

guide_step: Run your first mission › Step 5: Set your limits
note: Image shows the Composer Limits section with the three fields named by the step: max_iterations (Max iterations = 10), consecutive_passes_required (Pass streak = 2), and max_budget_usd (Spend cap = 25). Demo values only; no real emails, tokens, or secrets. No error state.

guide_step: Run your first mission › Step 6: Start the run
note: Resolved 2026-07-22 (gap-fill pass): real 1440x900 capture of the live composer's mission.yaml preview pane with the Save & Launch button. Demo values only (demo-app folder, demo-mission, repo github.com/acme/demo-app, live_url demo.example.com); queue panel in its empty state with server-rendered demo priority items. No real emails, tokens, session identifiers, or operator data in frame. The guide step now names Save & Launch, the control that replaced the retired 'Start run' button, so the step wording and the capture agree.

guide_step: Run your first mission › Step 7: Watch it iterate
note: The step depicts a Mission timeline panel with a per-iteration build / deploy-gate / test breakdown. The live /dashboard surfaces an Active runs table (Mission/Status/Iter/Streak/Cost) but no per-iteration breakdown, and its runs data is control-plane-gated: an unauthenticated render shows a data-load error and an authenticated render would expose real operator run data (PII). No clean, sanitized timeline is capturable, so no image was written and none was fabricated. Follow-up guide-text revision needed to describe the Active runs table instead of a per-iteration timeline. Matches inventory capture=flagged for this slot. pii_review pass because no image exists and nothing sensitive is listed.
